title: pollinations.ai redesign: scene background, palette system, and color updates
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh coat of pixels
gist.blurb: We've completely revamped the website with a cozy new pixel art background, a fresh color palette, and floating pollen particles. The hive has never looked better!
gist.summary: A major frontend overhaul that replaces the old theming engine with a centralized color palette and introduces a dynamic pixel art background.
gist.impact: Visitors will notice a much cozier, cohesive interface with beautiful retro pixel art scenery and clearer visual hierarchy across all pages.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a painter, actively painting the new pixel art background (sky and ground) with a palette of the new tier colors, representing the UI redesign and new color system.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, holding a wooden palette and painting a beautiful gradient sky with floating pollen particles. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a colorful new UI. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'NEW LOOK'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
